# Step 4 — PR Detail View

> The full-page read/write view of a single Purchase Request. For the Creator, this screen is **editable when status is Draft** and **read-only when status is INPROGRESS or beyond**.

![PR Detail — INPROGRESS](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 4.1 Access Path

- Click any **PR No.** link from the PR List (Step 1)
- After saving/submitting from the Create form (Step 2)

URL: `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid`

---

## 4.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PR List"] --> create["2. Create PR"]
    list --> tmpl["3. Create from Template"]
    create --> detail["4. PR Detail"]
    tmpl --> detail
    detail -->|Edit| edit["5. Edit PR"]
    edit --> submit["6. Submit Confirmation"]
    submit --> inprog(["Submitted - In Progress"])
    inprog -->|Returned| returned["7. Returned PR"]
    returned --> edit
    detail -->|Delete| del["8. Delete Confirmation"]
    del --> list
    style detail fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 4.3 Header Fields

These fields appear at the top of the detail page and are visible in all statuses.

| Field | Edit Permission (Draft) | Edit Permission (INPROGRESS+) | Description |
|-------|------------------------|-------------------------------|-------------|
| **PR No.** | View Only | View Only | Auto-generated reference e.g. `PR20260400031` |
| **Date** | View Only | View Only | PR creation date |
| **Requestor** | View Only | View Only | Creator's display name |
| **Department** | View Only | View Only | Creator's department |
| **Workflow** (PR Type) | **Editable** | View Only | General / Asset / Market List |
| **Description** | **Editable** | View Only | Free-text purpose note |
| **Status badge** | — | — | Current status (see §4.7) |

---

## 4.4 Tabs

| Tab | Available In | Content |
|-----|-------------|---------|
| **Items** | All statuses | Line items grid |
| **Workflow History** | All statuses | Approval timeline |

Default active tab: **Items**.

---

## 4.5 Items Tab

The items tab shows all line items in a read-only grid when status ≠ Draft, or an editable grid when status = Draft.

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Location** | Sub-location within property |
| **Product** | Item name (may include Thai name) |
| **Requested** | Requested quantity with unit |
| **Amount** | Qty × Unit Price |
| **Currency** | Transaction currency |
| **Delivery Point** | Final delivery destination |
| **Delivery Date** | Requested delivery date |

**Footer row** shows:
- Subtotal, Tax, Total in transaction currency

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** The BRD (FR-PR-003) specifies line-level discount, tax, and net amount columns. The current UI Items tab only shows Requested / Amount / Currency / Delivery Point / Delivery Date. No discount or tax columns are visible per line item. Total row shows Subtotal: 0.00 / Tax: 0.00 / Total: 0.00 even for items with quantity > 0 — suggesting unit prices are not populated. Flag: pricing/unit price data appears missing or not displayed.

For INPROGRESS status, an additional **"KS" stage indicator button** appears top-right of the Items tab — this represents the current workflow approver's initials and is not a Creator action.

---

## 4.6 Workflow History Tab

![Workflow History Tab](data:image/png;base64,)

Shows a **vertical timeline** of all workflow events. Each node contains:

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Stage badge** | Current stage status: `RECEIVED`, `PENDING`, `APPROVED`, `RETURNED`, `REJECTED` |
| **Date/Time** | Timestamp of the action (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm) |
| **Actor** | Name of the user who performed the action |
| **Action label** | e.g. "Create Request", "HOD: ..." |
| **Stage name** | The workflow step name (e.g. HOD, Purchase, FC) |

The timeline is read-only for the Creator. It serves as the full audit trail.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** The BRD (FR-PR-005) specifies "Approval history tracking with full audit trail" including timestamps and user identity. The visual timeline implementation fulfils this requirement. However, there is no export or print option for the history tab specifically.

---

## 4.7 Status Badges & Transitions

| Status | Badge | Creator Can Act? |
|--------|-------|-----------------|
| `DRAFT` | Grey | Edit, Submit, Delete |
| `INPROGRESS` | Amber | View only |
| `APPROVED` | Green | View only |
| `VOID` | Red | View only (Edit per BRD FR-PR-011 — TBC in UI) |
| `COMPLETED` | Blue | View only |

---

## 4.8 Action Buttons, Behaviour & Validation

Action buttons available to the Creator depend on the PR's current status.

### Button Availability by Status

| Button | Color | DRAFT | INPROGRESS / APPROVED / COMPLETED | VOID | Purpose / Use Case |
|--------|-------|-------|-----------------------------------|------|--------------------|
| **Save** | Secondary | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | Persist edits as Draft — use when you want to save progress without submitting |
| **Submit** | Blue/Primary | ✅ (≥ 1 item + Workflow) | ❌ | ❌ | Send PR for approval — use when all items are confirmed and ready for review |
| **Delete** | Red/Danger | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | Permanently remove a Draft PR that is no longer needed |
| **Edit** | Secondary | — | ❌ | ⚠️ TBC | Re-open a Void PR for revision and resubmission (BRD FR-PR-011 — not yet confirmed in UI) |

> For INPROGRESS / APPROVED / COMPLETED: no action buttons shown for the Creator. The top-right area displays only the approver initials indicator ("KS") — not a Creator control.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD FR-PR-011 states Void PRs are editable by the Requestor. No Void PR was available in the test account to confirm. Needs verification.

---

### On Save (Draft only)

**Purpose / Use Case:** Persist current edits as Draft — use when you need to pause or review before submitting.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | PR status is DRAFT | BR-01 | Save proceeds; stays on page | Save button not shown for other statuses |
| 2 | At least one item is present | BR-13 | Draft saved at `/:uuid`; Delete button available | Header saved only |
| 3 | Location is not empty (per row) | FR-PR-002 | Row saved | Location field highlighted as required |
| 4 | Product is not empty (per row) | FR-PR-002 | Unit price auto-filled; row saved | Product field highlighted as required |
| 5 | Qty is more than 0 and at most 3 decimal places | BR-06 | Row saved | Row-level error shown on Qty field |
| 6 | Delivery date is today or later (if entered) | BR-10 | Date saved | Error shown below date field |
| 7 | No concurrent edit lock by another user | BR-13 | Save succeeds | Server returns lock error (TBC) |

---

### On Submit (Draft only)

**Purpose / Use Case:** Send the completed PR for approval. Triggers routing to the first approver. Cannot be undone.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Workflow (PR Type) is selected | BR-04 | Submit button is active | Button is disabled |
| 2 | At least 1 item is present | BR-05 | Submit button is active | Button is disabled |
| 3 | Location is not empty on all rows | FR-PR-002 | Proceeds to confirmation dialog | Row-level error shown on Location field |
| 4 | Product is not empty on all rows | FR-PR-002 | Proceeds to confirmation dialog | Row-level error shown on Product field |
| 5 | Qty is more than 0 on all rows | FR-PR-002 | Proceeds to confirmation dialog | Row-level error shown on Qty field |
| 6 | Budget is not exceeded | BR-09 | Soft commitment created; status → INPROGRESS | Warning shown or blocked depending on org config |
| 7 | PR status is still DRAFT at submit time | FR-PR-006 | Status → INPROGRESS; routed to first approver | Server rejects if status was concurrently changed |
| 8 | Approval workflow is configured for this PR Type | BR-04 | Email sent to first approver within 5 min | Error if workflow misconfigured (TBC) |

**Confirmation Dialog:**

| Element | Content |
|---------|----------|
| Title | "Submit Purchase Request" |
| Message | "Are you sure you want to submit this purchase request? Once submitted, it will be routed for approval and cannot be edited." |
| **OK** button (Blue/Primary) | Confirms submission — PR status changes `DRAFT` → `INPROGRESS`; Creator redirected to PR Detail (read-only) |
| **Cancel** button (Outline/Grey) | Closes dialog — PR remains in DRAFT; no changes made |

---

### On Delete (Draft only)

**Purpose / Use Case:** Permanently remove a Draft PR — use when it was created by mistake or is a duplicate.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | PR status is DRAFT | BR-15 | Delete confirmation dialog shown | Delete button not visible |
| 2 | Creator is the PR owner | FR-PR-005A | PR permanently deleted after confirm; redirected to PR List | Deletion rejected (TBC) |

**Confirmation Dialog:**

| Element | Content |
|---------|----------|
| Title | "Delete Purchase Request" |
| Message | "Are you sure you want to delete this purchase request? This action cannot be undone." |
| **Delete** button (Red/Danger) | Permanently deletes PR and all items — redirected to PR List |
| **Cancel** button (Outline/Grey) | Closes dialog — PR unchanged |

---

### On Cancel (unsaved changes)

**Purpose / Use Case:** Discard any unsaved edits and return to the PR List.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Unsaved changes are present | BR-14 | "Discard changes?" dialog shown (confirmed in UI) | If no changes: returns to PR List immediately |

**Confirmation Dialog:**

| Element | Content |
|---------|----------|
| Title | "Discard Changes" |
| Message | "Are you sure you want to leave? All unsaved changes will be lost." |
| **Discard** button (Red/Danger) | Discards all unsaved changes — redirected to PR List |
| **Keep Editing** button (Outline/Grey) | Closes dialog — returns to form with changes intact |

---

## 4.9 Submit Confirmation Dialog

Triggered by clicking **Submit** on a Draft PR with ≥ 1 item.

→ Full documentation: **[step-06-submit-confirmation.md](step-06-submit-confirmation.md)**

On confirmation: status `DRAFT` → `INPROGRESS`; Workflow History entry `RECEIVED` added; PR routed to first approver.

---

## 4.10 Delete Confirmation Dialog

Triggered by clicking **Delete** on a Draft PR.

→ Full documentation: **[step-08-delete-confirmation.md](step-08-delete-confirmation.md)**

On confirmation: PR is permanently deleted; Creator redirected to PR List.

---

## 4.11 Edge Cases & Error States

| # | Scenario | System Behaviour |
|---|----------|-----------------|
| 1 | Creator tries to edit INPROGRESS PR | No edit controls visible; all fields read-only |
| 2 | Creator navigates directly to another user's PR UUID | Behaviour TBC — may show read-only or 403 |
| 3 | Network error loading PR detail | Loading skeletons remain; error toast expected |
| 4 | PR deleted by another user while Creator viewing | Stale data; next action should return 404 |
| 5 | Submit confirmation — PR routed but email fails | PR status still transitions; notification failure is silent |
| 6 | Workflow History fails to load | Spinner visible (observed during capture); retry mechanism TBC |

---

## 4.12 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Source |
|---|------|--------|
| BR-01 | **Draft** status: Creator has full edit capability — all header fields, items (add/edit/delete), attachments. | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-02 | **In-progress** status: Creator view is read-only. No edits allowed until PR is returned or rejected. | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-03 | **Void (Rejected)** status: Per BRD, Creator should have full edit capability to address rejection and resubmit. Re-submission changes status to In-progress. | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-04 | **Returned** status: Creator has full edit capability. Re-submission changes status to In-progress. | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-05 | **Approved / Completed / Cancelled**: Read-only for all roles including Creator. | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-06 | Approval comments by approvers are required (minimum 10 characters) for Reject and Return actions. Creator can see these in Workflow History. | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-07 | Status transitions are enforced server-side. Only valid transitions are allowed (e.g. Draft → In Progress on Submit; not Draft → Approved). | FR-PR-006 |
| BR-08 | Status changes trigger notifications to relevant stakeholders. Creator is notified when a PR is Approved, Rejected, or Returned. | FR-PR-006 |
| BR-09 | Soft budget commitment is created the moment the PR is **submitted** (not approved). Released if PR is rejected or cancelled within 1 hour. | FR-PR-004 |
| BR-10 | All workflow actions are logged in the Activity Log with: timestamp, user identity, action description. | FR-PR-010 |
| BR-11 | Detail view must display all sections: Header, Items grid, Financial Summary, Budget Information, Workflow Timeline, Attachments, Comments, Activity Log. Several sections (Budget, Attachments, Comments) are marked 🚧 Pending in BRD. | FR-PR-010 |
| BR-12 | **Financial Summary** must show: Subtotal, Total Discount, Net Amount, Total Tax, Grand Total, Currency & Exchange Rate. Currently the UI shows Subtotal/Tax/Total = 0.00 even for items with quantity — unit prices appear unpopulated. | FR-PR-003 |
| BR-13 | Edit locking: when a user is actively editing a PR, it should show "locked by [user]" to prevent concurrent modifications. | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-14 | Version history must be maintained for all modifications (what changed, who changed, when). | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-15 | Creator can **Delete** only Draft PRs. Delete is permanent and cannot be undone. | FR-PR-005A |
| BR-16 | Creator can **Cancel** an In-progress PR (not Delete). Cancellation requires a reason. Cancellation releases the budget commitment. | FR-PR-005A |
| BR-17 | Approvers receive email notification within 5 minutes of PR submission. Creator receives notification of each approval/rejection/return action. | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-18 | Related Purchase Orders (created after PR approval) should be linked and visible in the detail view under "Related Documents". | FR-PR-010 |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (BR-03):** BRD FR-PR-011 states Void PRs are editable by Requestor. The Editable Status Matrix (FR-PR-011 table) contradicts this, marking Void as ❌ View Only for Requestor. Clarification needed from business on the intended behaviour for Void PRs.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (BR-12):** Item totals show 0.00 in the UI even when items have quantities. Unit prices are not populated in test data. Financial summary cannot be verified without priced items.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (BR-16):** Cancel action for In-progress PRs was not observed in the Creator view during capture. BRD lists Cancel as a valid action. Needs verification with test data in INPROGRESS state.

---

## 4.13 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Breadcrumb **Purchase Request** | Step 1 — PR List |
| **Submit** → Confirm | This page refreshes to INPROGRESS state |
| **Delete** → Confirm | Step 1 — PR List |
| **Cancel** (on Draft form) | Step 1 — PR List |

---

## 4.14 Budget Tab (FR-PR-027)

The PR detail page includes a **Budget** tab alongside Items and Workflow History. Creator has **view-only** access.

| Action | Creator |
|--------|---------|
| View Budget Tab | ✅ View-only |
| Add / Edit / Delete Budget Entry | ❌ Not permitted |

**What Creator can see:**

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Location | Department cost centre |
| Category | Budget category (F&B, Equipment, Services, etc.) |
| Total Budget | Allocated budget |
| Soft Commitment (Dept Head) | Committed at HOD approval stage |
| Soft Commitment (PO) | Committed via issued POs |
| Hard Commitment | Confirmed commitments |
| Available Budget | Total − all commitments |
| Current PR Amount | This PR's contribution |
| Status | Over Budget / Near Limit (≥80%) / Within Budget |

> **Business purpose:** Creator can see whether their PR will exceed department budget before submission. Budget entries are managed by Purchasing Staff and Finance Manager (FR-PR-027).

> ⚠️ **Status (FR-PR-027):** ✅ Implemented per BRD. Budget Tab in Creator view not directly verified in screen capture session — assumed accessible per same tab bar as Purchaser/Approver views.

---

## 4.15 Multi-Currency Display (FR-PR-029)

Creator selects the **document currency** when creating a PR. When the document currency differs from the organisation's base currency, the system shows dual amounts throughout the PR.

| Scenario | Primary Display | Secondary Display | Badges |
|----------|-----------------|-------------------|--------|
| Document currency = base currency | Transaction amount only | None | None |
| Document currency ≠ base currency | Transaction currency | Base currency (green, smaller text) | "Base Currency", "Rate: 1 X = Y Z" |

**Display locations** (FR-PR-029): Item detail cards (unit price, subtotal, discount, tax, total), Financial Summary footer — applies throughout the PR lifecycle.

**Creator-specific:**
- Document currency selected in PR header form at creation time
- Exchange rate auto-populated from system configuration
- Manual rate override is a Purchasing Staff permission — Creator cannot change exchange rate

> ⚠️ **TBC:** Dual display verification requires a PR with document currency ≠ base currency. Creator test data did not trigger dual display. See FR-PR-029 for full styling specification.

---

## 4.16 Comments (FR-PR-008)

**Status (FR-PR-008):** 🚧 Pending — comment UI partially implemented per BRD

| Action | Creator |
|--------|---------|
| View approver comments in Workflow History | ✅ Visible |
| Post new comment on PR | 🚧 Pending (Comment button present; full thread UI not implemented) |
| Edit / delete own comment | 🚧 Pending (within 15 min of posting per BRD) |

**Comment visibility rules (FR-PR-008):**
- All comments are internal — not visible to vendors
- Rejection/return comments by approvers (minimum 10 characters, FR-PR-005A) appear in Creator's Workflow History tab as the reason for rejection/return
- Creator receives email notification when PR is Approved, Rejected, or Returned (FR-PR-005)

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD FR-PR-008 specifies rich text formatting, threading, and attachment support. Live UI shows a basic Comment panel with simple text input. Full threading/edit/delete/rich-text UI not observed.

> ⚠️ **Documentation Gap (FR-PR-007):** BRD FR-PR-007 specifies a standalone "Document Attachments Section" in the PR Detail view with a file list, per-file preview, download, and delete actions. The live UI integrates attachments into the Comment dialog rather than providing a dedicated section. The following detail is not yet documented: supported file types and size limits, whether previously attached files are listed/accessible from the PR Detail (outside of a comment), and whether the Creator can delete attachments after the PR has been submitted. Priority: Medium.

---

## 4.17 Undocumented Features

The following BRD requirements affect the Creator persona but have not yet been captured in live UI documentation for this step.

| FR | Title | Priority | BRD Status | Notes |
|----|-------|----------|------------|-------|
| FR-PR-007 | Document Attachments | Medium | 🔧 Partial | Standalone file list, preview, download, delete — integrated into Comment dialog in live UI; dedicated section not implemented |
| FR-PR-012 | Copy & Template | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Creator ability to start a PR from a saved template or copy an existing PR — no live UI evidence observed |
| FR-PR-014 | Notifications | High | 🚧 Pending | Email notifications to Creator on approval, rejection, and return — FR-PR-005 references this but delivery timing, templates, and preference config not documented |
| FR-PR-015 | Mobile Responsiveness | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Touch target sizing and mobile form usability in PR Detail view — not verified on mobile viewports |
| FR-PR-021 | Item Metadata Enhancement | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Required Date and Delivery Point comments per line item — fields not observed in Creator PR Detail |
| FR-PR-022 | Delivery Point Dropdown | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Typeahead with master data filtering — Delivery Point field behaviour in Creator view not documented |
| FR-PR-023 | Header Total Removal | Low | 🚧 Pending | BRD specifies suppression of PR header total for Requestor role — whether this applies to the Creator persona is TBC |
| FR-PR-025 | Monetary Formatting | Medium | 🚧 Pending | Locale-aware number formatting on monetary display fields — formatting behaviour in Creator read-only view not explicitly documented |

| Sidebar **Purchase Request** | Step 1 — PR List |
